summary: Tested Growth Engine UI after visual polish pass (Luxury Minimal AI design). All backend APIs (19/19 tests) and frontend UI flows passed. Visual design uses em-glass, em-card, em-input CSS classes with dark UI, glass panels, gradient accents, and strong spacing. All existing functionality preserved.

test_classes: TestGrowthAuthRequired (5 tests) - All endpoints return 401 without auth
TestGrowthCrawl (4 tests) - Crawl success, missing URL, empty URL, invalid URL
TestGrowthPages (4 tests) - List pages, get page by ID, nonexistent page, invalid ID
TestGrowthAnalyze (3 tests) - Analyze success with AI, missing page_id, nonexistent page
TestGrowthDelete (2 tests) - Delete page, delete nonexistent page

features_tested.feature: Growth button visible in TopBar after login
Clicking Growth opens GrowthPanel with URL input and Crawl & Extract button
Pages list shows existing crawled pages
Crawling a URL (example.com) shows loading state then adds page to list
Clicking a page shows detail with metrics (word count, links, images)
Page detail shows metadata (title, meta description, canonical, robots)
Clicking Analyze SEO runs analysis and shows 5 SEO opportunity sections
Delete button removes a page from list
Empty state shown when no pages exist
Error state shown for invalid URLs

design_elements_verified: Metric cards with gradient top edge

seed_data_creation: Created test pages during testing by crawling https://example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Engine visual polish pass complete. All functionality preserved after GrowthPanel.jsx rewrite. Design uses Luxury Minimal AI direction with em-glass, em-card CSS classes from globals.css. Backend APIs unchanged and working. AI analysis uses GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key.
